channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI Obsession Is a Big Nothing Burger
item.description: Concerns about partners obsessed with AI will soon feel outdated.

item.title: Jeffries evades talk about N.J. Democratic candidate's link to 1993 WTC bombing mastermind
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries on Sunday declined to condemn New Jersey Democratic congressional nominee Adam Hamawy, despite being shown trial evidence.

item.title: Trump expresses support to funding Anti-Weaponization Fund but not committed to reviving it
item.description: President Trump expressed support Sunday for the now-defunct $1.8 billion fund to compensate people who say they were targeted by the Biden administration.

item.title: Rolling Back Safetyism Requires Parents and Policymakers
item.description: How can we expect young people to become responsible adults when we are constantly sheltering them?
